programme.title: Gordon Smith Fashion
programme.desc: Gordon Smith is an iconic Australian fashion label meeting the demand for high-quality garments that transcend fads and trends. Offering timeless style to women.

programme.title: SKIMGUARD Secure Protection
programme.desc: Stay protected with SkimGuard Secure Protection. Utilising RFID blocking technology. Safeguard the sensitive data on your credit cards and passport from identity theft. Secure your privacy.

programme.title: WheyLess A Healthy Lifestyle
programme.desc: Wheyless is a nutrient-rich supplement designed to complement a healthy diet. Known for its energy-boosting properties without spiking blood sugar levels. Feel fuller for longer with Wheyless.

programme.title: SKINN by Dimitri James
programme.desc: Glow up with SKINN. Revisit this revolutionary skincare with intelligent formulas. These exclusive and inspired products deliver a healthy radiant complexion. There's nothing else like SKINN.

programme.title: SKINN by Dimitri James
programme.desc: Glow up with SKINN. Revisit this revolutionary skincare with intelligent formulas. These exclusive and inspired products deliver a healthy radiant complexion. There's nothing else like SKINN.

programme.desc: Get ready for unbeatable deals at our SUPER SALE Day starting TODAY! Dive into our frenzy of savings now and snag these bargains from your favourite brands before they're gone!

programme.title: Good Morning TVSN
programme.desc: Kick off your mornings with TVSN. Watch as we showcase hot products with special sneak peeks and lively competitions. Catch vibrant and engaging mornings with us here at TVSN!

programme.title: Elizabeth Grant Beauty
programme.desc: Transform your skincare routine with Elizabeth Grant Beauty. A trusted name since 1958. Rejuvenate even the most damaged skin and experience the transformation today.

programme.title: Gallery of Gold
programme.desc: Experience timeless elegance at Gallery of Gold, where exquisite craftsmanship meets your unique style. Discover curated gold jewellery reflecting enduring beauty.

programme.title: Carla Oates The Beauty Chef
programme.desc: Watch Carla in the kitchen whipping up certified organic and naturally fermented superfood blends - a powerhouse of nutrients and healthy bacteria. Beauty begins in the belly for radiant skin.

programme.title: Aggel Fashion
programme.desc: Step out in style with Aggel Fashion. Contemporary designs and quality fabrics create versatile and flattering pieces that bring confidence and comfort with effortless elegance to your wardrobe.

programme.title: Elizabeth Grant Beauty
programme.desc: Transform your skincare routine with Elizabeth Grant Beauty. A trusted name since 1958. Rejuvenate even the most damaged skin and experience the transformation today.

programme.title: Bring it in Live Activewear
programme.desc: Move with confidence with Bring It In Live Activewear. This collection is designed to support real bodies through real movement. Created with performance and lifestyle in mind.

programme.title: Gallery of Gold
programme.desc: Experience timeless elegance at Gallery of Gold, where exquisite craftsmanship meets your unique style. Discover curated gold jewellery reflecting enduring beauty.

programme.title: Collectable Coins
programme.desc: Dive into numismatics and explore a treasure trove of collectible coins. Own a piece of history with these distinctive pieces. Uncover hidden finds and invest in the past. A unique experience awaits.

programme.title: Aggel Fashion
programme.desc: Step out in style with Aggel Fashion. Contemporary designs and quality fabrics create versatile and flattering pieces that bring confidence and comfort with effortless elegance to your wardrobe.

programme.title: Diamonesque LUXE Edition
programme.desc: An epitome of sparkling elegance at an irresistible price point. Elevate your style with exquisite jewellery without breaking the bank. The allure of luxury with TVSN's exclusive collection.

programme.title: Bring it in Live Activewear
programme.desc: Move with confidence with Bring It In Live Activewear. This collection is designed to support real bodies through real movement. Created with performance and lifestyle in mind.

programme.title: Gemset TBC
programme.desc: Discover the brilliance of this showcase of stunning gemstones and exquisite jewels. Explore dazzling designs and rare gems. Each piece crafted to perfection for collectors and jewellery lovers.

programme.title: Good Morning TVSN
programme.desc: Kick off your mornings with TVSN. Watch as we showcase hot products with special sneak peeks and lively competitions. Catch vibrant and engaging mornings with us here at TVSN!

programme.title: Tanzanian Rose Zircon
programme.desc: Known for its stunning pinkish hues this gemstone adds a touch of elegance and sophistication to any jewellery collection. Explore our exquisite range and find your perfect piece today.

programme.title: Alpha H Skin Resurfacing
programme.desc: Unlock the power of glycolic-based skincare with Alpha H. Formulated to penetrate the epidermis. Promoting cellular renewal while stimulating collagen production and smoothing skin texture.

programme.title: Aggel Fashion
programme.desc: Step out in style with Aggel Fashion. Contemporary designs and quality fabrics create versatile and flattering pieces that bring confidence and comfort with effortless elegance to your wardrobe.

programme.title: Maestro Air Purifier
programme.desc: Enjoy fresh, clean air with this intelligent air purifier. Eliminate airborne particles quietly and efficiently. Compact and portable for every room. It's pure comfort you can breathe in.

programme.desc: Move with confidence with Bring It In Live Activewear. This collection is designed to support real bodies through real movement. Created with performance and lifestyle in mind.

programme.title: Rose De France in Silver
programme.desc: Rose De France Amethyst jewellery in stunning silver settings. Find statement pieces or delicate accents in captivating pink lavender hues. Discover your perfect match and embrace timeless style.

programme.desc: The Health department features health supplements to balance your inner self, aromatherapy to soothe or invigorate and fitness equipment to make you look and feel fantastic.

programme.desc: An epitome of sparkling elegance at an irresistible price point. Elevate your style with exquisite jewellery without breaking the bank. The allure of luxury with TVSN's exclusive collection.

programme.title: Bring it in Live Activewear
programme.desc: Move with confidence with Bring It In Live Activewear. This collection is designed to support real bodies through real movement. Created with performance and lifestyle in mind.

programme.title: Gemset TBC
programme.desc: Discover the brilliance of this showcase of stunning gemstones and exquisite jewels. Explore dazzling designs and rare gems. Each piece crafted to perfection for collectors and jewellery lovers.

programme.title: Tanzanian Rose Zircon
programme.desc: Known for its stunning pinkish hues this gemstone adds a touch of elegance and sophistication to any jewellery collection. Explore our exquisite range and find your perfect piece today.

programme.title: Alpha H Skin Resurfacing
programme.desc: Unlock the power of glycolic-based skincare with Alpha H. Formulated to penetrate the epidermis. Promoting cellular renewal while stimulating collagen production and smoothing skin texture.

programme.title: Aggel Fashion
programme.desc: Step out in style with Aggel Fashion. Contemporary designs and quality fabrics create versatile and flattering pieces that bring confidence and comfort with effortless elegance to your wardrobe.

programme.title: Maestro Air Purifier
programme.desc: Enjoy fresh, clean air with this intelligent air purifier. Eliminate airborne particles quietly and efficiently. Compact and portable for every room. It's pure comfort you can breathe in.

programme.title: Bring it in Live Activewear
programme.desc: Move with confidence with Bring It In Live Activewear. This collection is designed to support real bodies through real movement. Created with performance and lifestyle in mind.

programme.title: Carla Oates The Beauty Chef
programme.desc: Watch Carla in the kitchen whipping up certified organic and naturally fermented superfood blends - a powerhouse of nutrients and healthy bacteria. Beauty begins in the belly for radiant skin.

programme.title: Carla Oates The Beauty Chef
programme.desc: Watch Carla in the kitchen whipping up certified organic and naturally fermented superfood blends - a powerhouse of nutrients and healthy bacteria. Beauty begins in the belly for radiant skin.

programme.title: Live: Sky Racing 1 Raceday
programme.desc: Thoroughbreds from Ararat, Grafton, Santa Anita, Sunland Park, Remington Park, Gavea; Greyhound Racing from Ballarat, Shepparton, Warrnambool, Addington; Harness Racing from Goulburn, Maryborough, Gawler, Pinjarra.

programme.desc: Thoroughbreds from Funabashi; Greyhound Racing from Maitland, Nowra, Warrnambool, Sandown Park, Angle Park, Mandurah, Launceston, Shepparton, Dunstall Park, Romford, Harlow, Youghal; Harness Racing from Albion Park, Pinjarra, Caen.

programme.desc: The host provides a concise overview and in-depth analysis of social, political and economic news stories from around the world.

programme.title: Blur: To The End
programme.desc: Iconic British rock-band Blur reunite to record their first album after an 8 year hiatus, garnering the biggest audiences of their musical careers. 2024. UK. Director: Toby L.

programme.title: Frybread Face and Me
programme.desc: Two adolescent Navajo cousins bond at a family ranch over summer, learning their family history. 2023. United States. Director: Billy Luther. Starring: Keir Tallman, Charley Hogan.

programme.title: The Monk And The Gun
programme.desc: When Bhutan's king abdicates in favour of democratic reform, a strange series of events unfolds. 2023. Bhutan. Director: Pawo Choyning Dorji. Starring: Tandin Wangchuk.

programme.title: The White Ribbon
programme.desc: A series of attacks on upperclass townsfolk triggers an inquiry with no credible suspects. 2008. Germany, Austria. Director: Michael Haneke. Starring: Christian Friedel, Ernst Jacobi.

programme.title: Vaka
programme.desc: 1/5. Stockholm becomes a war zone, Johannes executes the plan, and Elin grows desperate. 2025. United States, Iceland. Director: Henrik Georgsson. Starring: Jonas Karlsson, Aliette Opheim.

programme.title: The Critic
programme.desc: A critic, an actress, and the owner of a newspaper become entangled in a web of lies following a murder. 2023. UK, USA. Director: Arnand Tucker. Starring: Ian McKellen, Gemma Arterton.

programme.title: Milked
programme.desc: A young activist goes deep into dairy land and takes on the giants of New Zealand's most powerful industry, exposing the whitewash and searching for solutions. 2021. NZ. Director: Amy Taylor.

programme.title: Sometimes I Think About Dying
programme.desc: Fran may work a cubicle, but her mind wanders far beyond the confines of those four compact walls. 2023. USA. Director: Rachel Lambert. Starring: Daisy Ridley, Dave Merheje.

programme.title: Growing Happiness
programme.desc: To save their dying town in drought-stricken Outback Australia, two farmers stage a vibrant Sunflower Festival. 2024. Australia. Director: Neil McGregor.

programme.title: In Vitro
programme.desc: As climate change devistates world agicultural, Layla's husband Jack offers some horrific solutions. 2024. Australia. Directors: Will Howarth, Tom McKeith. Starring: Will Howarth, Talia Zucker.

programme.title: Exhuma
programme.desc: The process of excavating an ominous grave unleashes long hidden secrets and dreadful consequences buried underneath. 2024. South Korea. Director: Jang Jae-hyun. Starring: Choi Min-sik.

programme.title: Frybread Face and Me
programme.desc: Two adolescent Navajo cousins bond at a family ranch over summer, learning their family history. 2023. United States. Director: Billy Luther. Starring: Keir Tallman, Charley Hogan.

programme.title: The Monk And The Gun
programme.desc: When Bhutan's king abdicates in favour of democratic reform, a strange series of events unfolds. 2023. Bhutan. Director: Pawo Choyning Dorji. Starring: Tandin Wangchuk.

programme.title: Sometimes I Think About Dying
programme.desc: Fran may work a cubicle, but her mind wanders far beyond the confines of those four compact walls. 2023. USA. Director: Rachel Lambert. Starring: Daisy Ridley, Dave Merheje.

programme.title: Clockwise
programme.desc: A headmaster, obsessed with timeliness, misses his train to an important speech turning his day on it's head. 1986. UK. Director: Christopher Morahan. Starring: John Cleese, Penny Leatherbarrow.

programme.title: Nothing But The Best
programme.desc: An ambitious businessman hires an unemployed man to tutor him in the life skills which he thinks are necessary to succeed. 1964. UK. Director: Clive Donner. Starring: Alan Bates.

programme.title: This Time Next Year
programme.desc: Born just minutes apart, Minnie and Quinn were driven apart by time, will fate bring them back together? 2024. UK. Director: Nick Moore. Starring: Sophie Cookson, Lucien Laviscount.

programme.title: Neneh Superstar
programme.desc: Despite her medical condition 12-year-old Neneh dreams of joining the Paris Opera Ballet. 2022. France. Director: Ramzi Ben Sliman. Starring: Oumy Bruni Garrel, Maiwenn.

programme.title: Holy Cow
programme.desc: Totone trades in teenagehood to provide for his kid sister, turning to cheese making for a steady income. 2024. France. Director: Louise Courvoisier. Starring: Clement Faveau, Maiwene Barthelemy.

programme.title: Mysterious Skin
programme.desc: Two young boys' childhood trauma leads them both down two different paths in life. 2004. United Kingdom, Netherlands. Director: Gregg Araki. Starring: Brady Corbet, Joseph Gordon-Levitt.

programme.title: You, The Living
programme.desc: A series of short vignettes depicting the sorrow, joy, love, and longing that is the human experience. 2007. Sweden. Director: Roy Andersson. Starring: Elisabeth Helander, Jorgen Nohall.

programme.title: Mozart's Sister
programme.desc: The story of the other Mozart, Maria-Anna, a child prodigy forgotten to time. 2024. Australia. Director: Madeleine Hetherton-Miau.

programme.title: Toy Love
programme.desc: Sleezy Ben has just exited a not-so faithful relationship, when he falls for an unpredictable vixen, Chlo. 2002. New Zealand. Director: Harry Sinclair. Starring: Dean O'Gorman, Kate Elliott.

programme.title: Solitude
programme.desc: An old farmer forms an unlikely friendship with a young paper boy. 2023. Iceland. Director: Ninna Palmadottir. Starring: Þrostur Leo Gunnarsson, Hermann Samuelsson, Anna Gunndis Guðmundsdottir.

programme.title: National Anthem
programme.desc: Dylan joins a vibrant workforce at a ranch in New Mexico to provide for his family, discovering his own identity. 2023. USA. Director: Luke Gilford. Starring: Charlie Plummer, Eve Lindley.

programme.title: Splice Here: A Projected Odyssey
programme.desc: Take a look at the passionate group of projectionists keeping the art of physical film projection alive. 2022. Australia. Director: Rob Murphy.

programme.title: Holy Cow
programme.desc: Totone trades in teenagehood to provide for his kid sister, turning to cheese making for a steady income. 2024. France. Director: Louise Courvoisier. Starring: Clement Faveau, Maiwene Barthelemy.

programme.title: You, The Living
programme.desc: A series of short vignettes depicting the sorrow, joy, love, and longing that is the human experience. 2007. Sweden. Director: Roy Andersson. Starring: Elisabeth Helander, Jorgen Nohall.

programme.title: Splice Here: A Projected Odyssey
programme.desc: Take a look at the passionate group of projectionists keeping the art of physical film projection alive. 2022. Australia. Director: Rob Murphy.

programme.title: National Anthem
programme.desc: Dylan joins a vibrant workforce at a ranch in New Mexico to provide for his family, discovering his own identity. 2023. USA. Director: Luke Gilford. Starring: Charlie Plummer, Eve Lindley.

programme.title: Brown Vs. Brown
programme.desc: A dive into the work of late architect - Peter Mark-Brown. 2023. New Zealand. Director: Simon Mark-Brown.

programme.title: Code Unknown
programme.desc: A careless act of littering entangles three strangers, leading to one of them being deported. 2000. France, Germany. Director: Michael Haneke. Starring: Juliette Binoche, Thierry Neuvic.

programme.title: Marguerite's Theorem
programme.desc: A semi-autistic mathematics student must start anew when she makes a mistake on her final thesis. 2023. France. Director: Anna Novion. Starring: Ella Rumpf, Jean-Pierre Darroussin.

programme.title: Gen_
programme.desc: A doctor at a Milan hospital defies government and corporate greed to uphold his oath as a doctor. 2025. France, Switzerland, Italy. Director: Gianluca Matarrese.

programme.title: The Room Next Door
programme.desc: Years after Ingrid and Martha's career paths diverged, their paths meet again. 2024. Spain, United States. Director: Pedro Almodovar. Starring: Julianne Moore, Tilda Swinton.

programme.title: Families Like Ours
programme.desc: 1/1. Rising sea levels force Laura to decide between her divorced parents and love. 2024. Director: Thomas Vinterberg. Starring: Amaryllis April Maltha August, Albert Rudbeck Lindhardt.

programme.title: Families Like Ours
programme.desc: 1/2. Each passing day brings Laura and Elias closer together. 2024. Director: Thomas Vinterberg. Starring: Amaryllis April Maltha August, Albert Rudbeck Lindhardt.

programme.title: Families Like Ours
programme.desc: 1/3. As Denmark sinks, angry workers storm the estate looking to get paid. 2024. Denmark. Director: Thomas Vinterberg. Starring: Amaryllis April Maltha August, Albert Rudbeck Lindhardt.

programme.title: Families Like Ours
programme.desc: 1/4. Laura says her goodbyes to Fanny and begins a quest of her own. 2024. Denmark. Director: Thomas Vinterberg. Starring: Imad Abul-Foul, Amaryllis April Maltha August.

programme.title: Families Like Ours
programme.desc: 1/5. Jacob risks his family's wellbeing when he asks French police to help find Laura. 2024. Denmark. Director: Thomas Vinterberg. Starring: Amaryllis April Maltha August, Yoann Blanc.

programme.title: Families Like Ours
programme.desc: 1/6. Comforted by her reunion with Fanny, Laura still fears that she will never see Elias again. 2024. Denmark. Director: Thomas Vinterberg. Starring: Tourialay Akbari, Marcela Andrei.

programme.title: Families Like Ours
programme.desc: 1/7. Laura builds a new life in Bucharest, though her family and friends are sorely missed. 2024. Denmark. Director: Thomas Vinterberg. Starring: Tourialay Akbari, Marianna Arzumanova.

programme.title: Mutiny In Heaven: The Birthday Party
programme.desc: Nick Cave and his first band offer an unfiltered and immersive exploration of their post-punk success on the global stage. 2023. Australia. Director: Ian White.

programme.title: Code Unknown
programme.desc: A careless act of littering entangles three strangers, leading to one of them being deported. 2000. France, Germany. Director: Michael Haneke. Starring: Juliette Binoche, Thierry Neuvic.

programme.title: Brown Vs. Brown
programme.desc: A dive into the work of late architect - Peter Mark-Brown. 2023. New Zealand. Director: Simon Mark-Brown.

programme.title: Marguerite's Theorem
programme.desc: A semi-autistic mathematics student must start anew when she makes a mistake on her final thesis. 2023. France. Director: Anna Novion. Starring: Ella Rumpf, Jean-Pierre Darroussin.

programme.title: Gen_
programme.desc: A doctor at a Milan hospital defies government and corporate greed to uphold his oath as a doctor. 2025. France, Switzerland, Italy. Director: Gianluca Matarrese.

programme.title: The Room Next Door
programme.desc: Years after Ingrid and Martha's career paths diverged, their paths meet again. 2024. Spain, United States. Director: Pedro Almodovar. Starring: Julianne Moore, Tilda Swinton.

programme.title: Any Day Now
programme.desc: An Iranian family remains optimistic as they appeal their denied application for asylum in Finland. 2020. Finland. Director: Hamy Ramezan. Starring: Aran-Sina Keshvari, Shahab Hosseini.

programme.title: Legacy: Apartheid's Shadow
programme.desc: Apartheid in South Africa may have fallen, however, the shadow of the brutal regime remains. 2024. South Africa. Director: Tara Erica Moore.

programme.title: Mullet
programme.desc: Eddie, Mullet, returns to his hometown, as he pursues his ex-lover cum sister-in-law, the town grows hostile. 2000. Australia. Director: David Caesar. Starring: Ben Mendelsohn, Susie Porter.

programme.title: The End
programme.desc: Years after environmental collapse, a family's idyllic bunker-life crumbles when a stranger arrives. 2024. Germany, Denmark. Director: Joshua Oppenheimer. Starring: Tilda Swinton, George MacKay.
